case_title: CHU, FRANK W. VS SAN FRANCISCO SHOPPING CENTER et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $50.00 FILED BY CHU, FRANK W. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHOPPING CENTER NORDSTRON    ATTN: SECURITY-MANAGEMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHOPPING CENTER NORDSTRON    ATTN: SECURITY-MANAGEMENT PLAINTIFF WAIVED HIS CLAIM FOR MONEY DAMAGES AND STATED THAT HE WAS ONLY ASKING FOR PERMISSION TO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLFT WAIVED HIS CLAIM FOR MONEY DAMAGES & STATED THAT HE WAS ONLY ASKING FOR PERMISSION TO CARRY HIS SIGN ON DEFT'S PROPERTY. THE ACTION IS DISM
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHOPPING CENTER
CERT MAIL TO ANY AUTHORIZED AGENT S.F. SHOPPING CENTER, RETURNED SIGNED.
WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE THE REQUEST IS FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF & INJUNCTIVE RELIEF IS NOT PERMITTED IN SMALL CLAIMS. CCP 116.220.
